list.name: profile_id
list.label: profile_id
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM scenario_experiment_result_day ORDER BY profile_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM scenario_experiment_result_day ORDER BY profile_id

list.name: scenario_name
list.label: scenario_name
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT scenario_name FROM scenario_experiment_result_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' ORDER BY scenario_name
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT scenario_name FROM scenario_experiment_result_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' ORDER BY scenario_name

targets.rawSql: SELECT dt AS time, scenario_name AS metric, risk_score_v3 AS value FROM scenario_experiment_result_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND ('${scenario_name}'='$__all' OR scenario_name='${scenario_name}') AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY time

SELECT dt AS time, scenario_name AS metric, predicted_alert_prob * 100 AS value FROM scenario_experiment_result_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND ('${scenario_name}'='$__all' OR scenario_name='${scenario_name}') AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY time

SELECT dt, scenario_name, scenario_type, risk_score_v2, risk_score_v3, predicted_alert_prob, predicted_label, root_cause_top1, traffic_page_view_count, missing_rate FROM scenario_experiment_result_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND ('${scenario_name}'='$__all' OR scenario_name='${scenario_name}') AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT dt AS time, 'validation_warn_count' AS metric, validation_warn_count AS value FROM scenario_experiment_result_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND ('${scenario_name}'='$__all' OR scenario_name='${scenario_name}') AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'validation_fail_count' AS metric, validation_fail_count AS value FROM scenario_experiment_result_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND ('${scenario_name}'='$__all' OR scenario_name='${scenario_name}') AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'drift_alert_count' AS metric, drift_alert_count AS value FROM scenario_experiment_result_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND ('${scenario_name}'='$__all' OR scenario_name='${scenario_name}') AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'ml_feature_alert_count' AS metric, ml_feature_alert_count AS value FROM scenario_experiment_result_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND ('${scenario_name}'='$__all' OR scenario_name='${scenario_name}') AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY time

SELECT dt AS time, 'traffic_page_view_count' AS metric, traffic_page_view_count AS value FROM scenario_experiment_result_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND ('${scenario_name}'='$__all' OR scenario_name='${scenario_name}') AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'missing_rate_x1000' AS metric, missing_rate * 1000 AS value FROM scenario_experiment_result_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND ('${scenario_name}'='$__all' OR scenario_name='${scenario_name}') AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY time

SELECT dt, scenario_name, scenario_type, risk_score_v2, risk_score_v3, validation_warn_count, validation_fail_count, drift_alert_count, drift_warn_count, ml_feature_alert_count, ml_feature_warn_count, predicted_alert_prob, predicted_label, root_cause_top1, traffic_page_view_count, missing_rate, note FROM scenario_experiment_result_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND ('${scenario_name}'='$__all' OR scenario_name='${scenario_name}') AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC, scenario_name
